params.name: Hamlet
params.description:
On Jan 19, 1603 AD, Nicholas published Hamlet without Shakespeare's permission.
Hamlet is a tragedy written by Shakespeare. It tells the story of how Hamlet's uncle murdered his father, not only usurped the throne, but also married his mother. Hamlet sought revenge on his uncle because of this. Hamlet is Shakespeare's most famous work and has been adapted into stage plays, operas, and various film and television productions many times since its publication. It is considered to be the first of …
